---
title: "Supplementary: PCA Correlation"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")
data_dir <- here("data")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

This heatmap shows the correlation structure of PCA scores across methods for
the `sc-mix` dataset using manual filtering, `n_comp = 30`, `n_hvg = 1000`,
`n_neig = 20`, and `d_cluster = 0`.

Rows and columns are ordered by method, then by PC, so the strongest
within-method signal follows the main diagonal.

```{r correlation-matrix}
rapids_old_lab <- "rapids<br />**v0.13.5**"
rapids_new_lab <- "rapids<br />**v0.14.1**"
method_order <- c(
  rapids_old_lab, rapids_new_lab, "scanpy", "osca", "scrapper", "seurat"
)

get_method <- function(path) {
  method <- sub(".*method_name-([^_/]+)_n_comp.*", "\\1", path)
  if (method == "rapids" && grepl("pipelines-py-old", path)) {
    rapids_old_lab
  } else if (method == "rapids") {
    rapids_new_lab
  } else {
    method
  }
}

paths <- list.files(
  file.path(data_dir, "out", "datasets", "datasets-r", "dataset_name-sc-mix"),
  pattern = "\\.pca\\.tsv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE
)
paths <- grep(
  "d_cluster-0_filter-manual_method_name-.*_n_comp-30_n_hvg-1000_n_neig-20",
  paths,
  value = TRUE
)

path_df <- data.frame(
  path = paths,
  method = vapply(paths, get_method, character(1))
) %>%
  filter(method %in% method_order) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_order)) %>%
  arrange(method)

pca_tables <- setNames(lapply(path_df$path, function(path) {
  tbl <- readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  stopifnot(names(tbl)[1] == "cell_id")
  tbl$cell_id <- as.character(tbl$cell_id)
  tbl
}), as.character(path_df$method))

ref <- pca_tables[[1]]
n_pcs <- ncol(ref) - 1

stopifnot(all(vapply(pca_tables[-1], function(tbl) {
  identical(tbl$cell_id, ref$cell_id) && identical(names(tbl), names(ref))
}, logical(1))))

pca_matrix <- do.call(cbind, lapply(pca_tables, function(tbl) as.matrix(tbl[-1])))

cor_mat <- cor(pca_matrix, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
keep <- as.vector(!is.na(cor_mat))
cor_df <- data.frame(
  x_pos = as.vector(col(cor_mat))[keep],
  y_pos = as.vector(row(cor_mat))[keep],
  correlation = as.vector(cor_mat)[keep]
)

gap_size <- 2
cor_df$x_pos <- cor_df$x_pos + ((cor_df$x_pos - 1) %/% n_pcs) * gap_size
cor_df$y_pos <- cor_df$y_pos + ((cor_df$y_pos - 1) %/% n_pcs) * gap_size

axis_labels <- names(pca_tables)
method_breaks <- (seq_along(pca_tables) - 1) * (n_pcs + gap_size) + (n_pcs + 1) / 2
plot_limit <- max(cor_df$x_pos) + 0.5
```

```{r supp4, fig.height=7, fig.width=6.69}
ggplot(cor_df, aes(x = x_pos, y = y_pos, fill = correlation)) +
  geom_tile(width = 1, height = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2B8CBE", mid = "#FFF7BC", high = "#D7301F",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1), name = "correlation",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      direction = "horizontal", title.position = "top",
      barwidth = unit(2.8, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = method_breaks, labels = axis_labels,
    limits = c(0.5, plot_limit), expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = method_breaks, labels = axis_labels,
    limits = c(plot_limit, 0.5), expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x.bottom = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    axis.text.y.left = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
  )
```
